description: Add task status tracking and filtering.

userStories.title: Add task status storage default
userStories.description: As a developer, I want task status persisted with default pending so status exists for every task.
acceptanceCriteria: Task status persistence supports pending, in progress, and done values.
Existing tasks receive pending as default status value.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add shared task status validation type
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared status validation helpers so backend and UI use same allowed values.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared status type and validation helper exported for reuse.
Validation rejects unsupported status values.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend task status update action
userStories.description: As a user, I want status changes saved through server logic so status updates persist reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Server action updates stored task status using shared validation.
Update action returns updated task payload with status value.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want badge on each task card so I can quickly scan status.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render pending, in progress, or done badge from status value.
Badge styling stays consistent across status values.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add inline status control in task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want inline status control in task list so I can change status without leaving list.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list status control exposes pending, in progress, and done options.
Selecting status triggers status update action and refreshes task state.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter for task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want filter by status so I can focus on pending, in progress, or done work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list filter options include all, pending, in progress, and done.
Filtering updates visible tasks without breaking existing sort behavior.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
